flashcards.definition: A test that does not assume a specific population distribution (e.g., normality).
Nonparametric alternative to the paired t-test; uses ranks of differences.
Nonparametric alternative to the independent two-sample t-test; compares rank sums.
Nonparametric alternative to one-way ANOVA; compares medians across three or more groups.
A rank-based correlation measuring monotonic association — robust to outliers and non-normality.
